compatibilityReport.summaryLine: Rahul and Priya share a deep cosmic connection with high emotional and spiritual alignment.
compatibilityReport.verdictBody: This is an exceptionally strong match. The high Maitri and Bhakoot scores indicate long-term stability and emotional resonance. No major Doshas found. Recommended for marriage.

predictions.detail_career_weekly: Jupiter's aspect on your 10th house brings a window of professional recognition this week. Avoid confrontations with seniors and focus on completing pending tasks. New opportunities may arrive through existing contacts.
predictions.detail_career_monthly: Saturn's steady transit supports disciplined efforts in your career this month. Expect slow but solid progress. Mid-month is ideal for applying to new roles or pitching proposals to management.
predictions.detail_career_yearly: This year marks a significant turning point in your professional life. Jupiter entering your 10th house in the second quarter brings promotions, recognition, and the possibility of a role change or new venture.
predictions.detail_marriage_weekly: Venus in the 7th house brings warmth and understanding in your relationship this week. Minor disagreements are possible on Wednesday — stay patient and listen actively.
predictions.detail_marriage_monthly: This month favors deepening emotional bonds. If single, the second half holds strong possibilities for a meaningful connection. Existing partnerships benefit from open communication.
predictions.detail_marriage_yearly: An auspicious year for relationships. Rahu in the 5th house may bring unexpected romantic developments. Those looking for marriage will find favorable planetary support in the June–September window.
predictions.detail_finance_weekly: Be cautious with impulsive spending this week. Rahu's influence on the 2nd house may create illusions of financial security. Avoid new loans or large investments until next week.
predictions.detail_finance_monthly: Stable month for finance with no major gains or losses. Fixed deposits or long-term SIPs are favored. Avoid speculation. Income from a secondary source is likely around the 20th.
predictions.detail_finance_yearly: Venus Mahadasha supports financial growth over the year. Focus on systematic investment in the first half. The festive season brings bonus potential. Real estate dealings are favorable after September.
predictions.detail_health_weekly: Good energy levels this week. Mars energizes your constitution — a great time to start a new fitness routine. Watch out for heat-related issues or minor inflammations.
predictions.detail_health_monthly: Overall vitality is strong this month. Focus on digestive health as Mercury governs your 6th house. Yoga and pranayama are highly recommended. Avoid skipping meals.
predictions.detail_health_yearly: A balanced year for health with no major planetary afflictions. Minor stress-related concerns in Q2 can be managed through consistent lifestyle habits. Annual health checkup recommended in January.
predictions.point_career_weekly_0: Present your ideas at work — Venus supports creative expression.
predictions.point_career_weekly_1: Networking events between Wednesday and Friday are highly productive.
predictions.point_career_weekly_2: Avoid signing contracts before Thursday; Mercury is still gaining strength.
predictions.point_career_monthly_0: Mid-month is the best window for salary negotiations or appraisals.
predictions.point_career_monthly_1: Saturn rewards those who maintain discipline and meet deadlines.
predictions.point_career_monthly_2: Technical or skills-based upskilling started now will pay off in 3 months.
predictions.point_career_yearly_0: Jupiter's transit through your 10th house is the defining event of the year.
predictions.point_career_yearly_1: March and October are peak months for professional milestones.
predictions.point_career_yearly_2: Partnerships or collaborations started this year have long-term potential.
predictions.point_marriage_weekly_0: Plan a thoughtful gesture for your partner — small acts carry big meaning now.
predictions.point_marriage_weekly_1: Avoid discussing finances or big decisions mid-week.
predictions.point_marriage_weekly_2: For singles: social gatherings on the weekend hold pleasant surprises.
predictions.point_marriage_monthly_0: Full Moon on the 15th amplifies emotions — be expressive, not reactive.
predictions.point_marriage_monthly_1: Travel together or plan something new to strengthen the bond.
predictions.point_marriage_monthly_2: Mercury retrograde in the final week: pause major relationship decisions.
predictions.point_marriage_yearly_0: Jupiter blesses committed relationships with stability and mutual growth.
predictions.point_marriage_yearly_1: Auspicious muhurtas for marriage or engagement fall between June 10–28.
predictions.point_marriage_yearly_2: Open, honest communication throughout the year prevents misunderstandings.
predictions.point_finance_weekly_0: Review your budget and avoid any impulse purchases above ₹5,000.
predictions.point_finance_weekly_1: A pending payment or refund is likely to arrive by Friday.
predictions.point_finance_weekly_2: Do not lend money to friends this week — high risk of non-repayment.
predictions.point_finance_monthly_0: SIPs and recurring deposits are favored over direct equity this month.
predictions.point_finance_monthly_1: An unexpected expense around the 10th — keep a small buffer ready.
predictions.point_finance_monthly_2: Income from freelance or secondary work is highlighted after the 20th.
predictions.point_finance_yearly_0: Avoid get-rich-quick schemes — Saturn rewards patience and long-term play.
predictions.point_finance_yearly_1: Real estate and gold investments are well-aspected after September.
predictions.point_finance_yearly_2: Year-end brings a financial boost through bonus, inheritance, or windfall.
predictions.point_health_weekly_0: Hydrate well and reduce spicy or fried foods — Mars can inflame digestion.
predictions.point_health_weekly_1: 30 minutes of outdoor activity each morning will significantly boost energy.
predictions.point_health_weekly_2: Watch for eye strain from excessive screen time — take regular breaks.
predictions.point_health_monthly_0: Prioritize sleep hygiene; Mercury governs the nervous system this month.
predictions.point_health_monthly_1: Digestive issues are the main health focus — eat light and on schedule.
predictions.point_health_monthly_2: Incorporate meditation or breathwork — Moon aspects the mind strongly.
predictions.point_health_yearly_0: Annual health checkup strongly recommended in January or February.
predictions.point_health_yearly_1: Stress management is the key health theme — build sustainable habits early.
predictions.point_health_yearly_2: Q3 brings high energy — ideal time to start long-term fitness goals.
predictions.remedy_0: Light a ghee lamp every Friday evening and chant the Venus mantra 108 times for relationship harmony.
predictions.remedy_1: Donate green leafy vegetables or green cloth on Wednesdays to strengthen Mercury.
predictions.remedy_2: Practice Surya Namaskar at sunrise daily to energize your Sun placement and boost vitality.
predictions.remedy_3: Consume turmeric milk (haldi doodh) at night to strengthen Jupiter and improve overall fortune.
